title: Orchestration Blueprint — machine-readable sidecar (v1)
description: JSON sidecar for the 14-field PLAN/COMPOSE Orchestration Blueprint. Captures the structurally critical fields so illegal state combinations can be caught by a validator before the blueprint is run. The prose blueprint remains the primary artifact; this sidecar is the machine-checkable layer that makes Wlaschin-class illegal states unrepresentable. Validated by check_blueprint.py when --sidecar flag is passed.

goal.description: The feature/plan/task this blueprint achieves (from field 1)

successCriterion.description: Objective 'done/good' test — what the verification gate checks (from field 1)

irreversible.description: True if the task involves irreversible, high-stakes, or production operations

unattended.description: True if the loop runs unattended (overnight, background, scheduled)

untrustedContentIngested.description: True if any loop input is attacker-controllable (open web, transcript, issue, channel, repo file)

type.description: The highest-trust gate the success criterion affords

mitigations.description: Required when type is 'self-grade' on irreversible work: separate-judge, return-best-not-last, anti-oscillation, iteration-cap

verifierStrongerThanGenerator.description: Confirms verifier model/method is >= generator in strength

layers.description: The stacked stop layers. Minimum 2 required; hard-cap alone is insufficient.

selfReported.description: MUST be false. Termination decided by the model is prohibited (First Principle 5).

hasStuckPath.description: True if an explicit STUCK/abort/escalate path is named for impossible tasks

iterationCounterNamed.description: True if the substrate names a specific iteration counter or progress signal (C8)

budgetSignalSurfaced.description: True if remaining budget/cost is surfaced to the operator in real time (C8)

killPathNamed.description: True if an external kill path is named (SIGINT, watchdog, abort flag) (C8)

perWorkerTraceId.description: For multi-agent runs: true if a per-worker trace/correlation ID is present

verdict.description: READY-TO-RUN requires dryRunExecuted: true. Default is BLUEPRINT-UNVERIFIED.

dryRunExecuted.description: True only if the blueprint has been exercised against the success criterion

externalActionsCapable.description: True if the loop can push, write, deploy, or take irreversible external action

containmentNamed.description: Required true when both untrustedContentIngested and externalActionsCapable are true (lethal trifecta)

containmentType.description: The structural containment mechanism when the trifecta is present

allOf.$comment: ILLEGAL STATE 1: self-grade as sole gate on irreversible work without mitigations

then.errorMessage: ILLEGAL STATE: self-grade gate on irreversible work requires at least one mitigation (separate-judge, return-best-not-last, anti-oscillation, or iteration-cap)

allOf.$comment: ILLEGAL STATE 2: READY-TO-RUN verdict without a dry run

then.errorMessage: ILLEGAL STATE: READY-TO-RUN verdict requires dryRunExecuted: true

allOf.$comment: ILLEGAL STATE 3: lethal trifecta (untrusted content + external action) without containment

then.errorMessage: ILLEGAL STATE: lethal trifecta (untrusted content + external actions) requires containmentNamed: true and a containmentType

allOf.$comment: ILLEGAL STATE 4: hard-cap as the only termination layer

then.errorMessage: ILLEGAL STATE: hard-cap alone is not a real stop. Layer it with goal-gate and no-progress detector.
